article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 19, 2023 (BSS) - Foreign minister Dr AK Abdul Momen today said he directed all the envoys saying abroad to intensify their efforts to promote trade of Bangladesh and investment in their respective host countries.

"I have directed officers in the (foreign) ministry to redouble our efforts to promote Bangladesh's trade and investment," he said while speaking at Bangladesh Business Summit and Networking Luncheon organized by FBCCI at a city hotel.
